---
name: Tool Documentation Request
about: Request documentation for a new Kali Linux tool
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Tool name

The name of the Kali Linux tool you want documented.

## Tool URL

Link to the tool's GitHub repo or Kali tools page.

## Why should this tool be documented?

Explain why this tool is useful and what category it falls under.

## Priority

- [ ] Core tool (used by most pentesters)
- [ ] Commonly used
- [ ] Specialized
- [ ] Supplementary

## Additional context

Any other information about the tool.
